title: Part 1 claim: M6 J21a-26 Smart Motorway Scheme
body: "Under Part I of the Land Compensation Act 1973, compensation can be claimed by anyone having a qualifying interest in land if the value of that interest has been depreciated by more than £50 by physical factors caused by the use of the altered highway.  This notice contains a summary of the law governing such claims. "

taxons.title: Property affected by roadworks and street works
